body.text:
🏆 Real Estate Conclave Season 6: Mission Accomplished!
What a day! The Real Estate Conclave Season 6: Uttar Pradesh was a powerful success, uniting the forces shaping UP's urban future.

We witnessed insightful discussions with top Government Leaders from RERA, LDA, and Housing Authorities, alongside leading Industry Titans from Emaar, Omaxe, Shalimar, Rishita, and Eldeco. The collaboration was electric!

Key takeaways for the future of investment and development have been set. Thank you to all the esteemed guests, panelists, and attendees for making it a landmark event at The Centrum, Lucknow!

Stay tuned for key highlights and policy insights!

#RealEstateConclave #UPRealEstate #LucknowEvent #Success #Investment #UrbanDevelopment #RERA #PostEvent

body.text:
Newly relocated to a state-of-the-art, brand new campus within the stunning surrounds of Uptown Cairo by Emaar Misr, American International School in Egypt offers an unparalleled educational journey. Discover a world-class international education for your child from KG1 to Grade 12, fostering academic excellence and personal growth. Explore our state-of-the-art facilities, including:

• Spacious, technology-enabled classrooms
• Inspiring arts and performance facilities
• Advanced laboratories
• World-class athletics complex
• Collaborative learning spaces
• Expansive open playgrounds

Admissions are Open! Apply Today!

Phone: 01200007644
Address: Uptown Cairo – El Mokattam

Location:
https://maps.app.goo.gl/mw4bNJ5nufF3qA3VY8

Registration Form:
https://www.aisegypt.com/admissions/apply

Join a legacy of 35 years of excellence in education. Secure your child's future today!
